tasks.subject: Task 1: zlib-compress delta payload at container boundary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** WriteContainer emits a zlib stream after the manifest; ReadContainer decompresses it; tests confirm round-trip and plaintext-v1 rejection.

**Files:**
- Modify: manifest.go (WriteContainer + ReadContainer)
- Modify: manifest_test.go (add TestContainerDeltaIsZlibFramed and TestContainerRejectsPlaintextDelta)

**Verify:** `just check && just test-sanitizers`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go", "manifest_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just check && just test-sanitizers", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zlib wrap in WriteContainer", "zlib unwrap in ReadContainer", "decompressing delta payload error prefix", "TestContainerDeltaIsZlibFramed passes", "TestContainerRejectsPlaintextDelta passes", "just check passes", "just test-sanitizers passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: README delta-payload note + size verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the wire-format change and confirm the size win on the Half-Life real-disc fixture.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md (Delta payload (binary) section)

**Verify:** build + pack half-life; size ≤ 1 MB; verify round-trips.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "go build -o /tmp/miniscram-zlib . && /tmp/miniscram-zlib pack -o /tmp/HALFLIFE-zlib.miniscram --keep-source -f -q half-life/HALFLIFE.cue && /tmp/miniscram-zlib verify /tmp/HALFLIFE-zlib.miniscram", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README documents zlib framing", "HALFLIFE.miniscram <= 1MB", "verify passes"]}
```
